title: Children's Felt Christmas Tree – 3.28ft DIY Felt Xmas Tree Set for Kids & Toddlers, Wall Hanging Xmas Decorations with 32 Ornaments, Home Door & Window Christmas Decor Kit
features: Updated Felt Christmas Tree: This set includes a 3.28ft DIY folding felt Christmas tree, 32 detachable ornaments with a festive theme, and a 5m LED light. Designed for kids and toddlers, the tree can be easily hung on any surface, enhancing your child's hands-on skills.

Perfect Christmas Gift for Kids: The felt Christmas tree set is one of the most popular and unique Christmas decorations for kids this year. The tree, with its cute ornaments featuring classic Christmas symbols, adds a festive touch to any themed party. DIYing the tree also helps improve your child's cognitive and motor skills

Versatile Wall Decoration: The felt Christmas tree kit allows you to freely attach the ornaments using the magic straps provided. The sticky pads are easy to use, with small squares that securely hold each piece in place, making them easy to attach and remove. This wall-hanging DIY Christmas tree is perfect for decorating walls, homes, outdoor spaces, stores, offices, classrooms, and more

Space-Saving and Long-Lasting: Our DIY felt Christmas tree is made of 2mm thick sturdy felt fabric, offering a safe and non-toxic, dustproof, and odorless alternative to a real tree. It’s affordable, takes up minimal space, and is easy to roll up and store for reuse year after year.
Note: The tree is folded for transport, so it may appear creased or slightly uneven upon arrival. Simply press or iron it to restore it to its original condition
